overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character in a futuristic delivery suit traversing a rainy, mountainous landscape. The character walks continuously along grassy shorelines and rocky terrain beside a lake, with mist-covered peaks visible in the background throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy lakeside shore with rocky ridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy shoreline with a large backpack, rain falling gently

entered.detail: calm dark water body running along the right side of the path
elevated rocky terrain with scattered boulders rising on the left
misty mountain peaks visible in the distant background
dense tall green grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy lakeside path with water on the right and a rocky ridge rising to the left. Misty mountains loom in the background under an overcast, rainy sky. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves through the tall grass.

events.description: screen briefly darkens then returns to normal brightness as character enters grassy meadow

agents.ego_description: walking through a grassy meadow dotted with white wildflowers, moving slightly inland from the water

entered.detail: open grassy area with shorter grass than the lakeside
scattered white flowers visible in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the lakeside into an open grassy meadow with white wildflowers. The rocky ridge draws closer on the left while the lake temporarily moves out of direct view. The lighting flickers briefly at the start of the segment.

events.description: ground surface changes from grass to rocky terrain with large boulders

agents.ego_description: navigating through uneven rocky terrain along the water's edge

entered.detail: uneven ground covered with rocks and gravel replacing the grass
prominent large rocks scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to rocky ground with large boulders as the character continues forward. The lake reappears on the left side while the character navigates the uneven rocky path. Vegetation becomes sparse in this rocky section.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy lakeside path with rocky outcrops

events.description: returns to grassy terrain from rocky path, continuing along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy shoreline with mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside rising on the right side of the path
distinctive rock formation visible in the distance ahead
cliff face appearing on the right as the path continues

segments.scene_description: The character returns to grassy terrain and continues along the lakeside path. Rocky slopes and cliffs rise on the right while the lake remains on the left. The path stretches ahead toward distant rocky outcrops and misty mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, mountainous landscape that shifts from lush lakeside paths to rugged rocky terrain and back again. It begins with the character walking through tall grass along a lakeside path, with a rocky ridge to the left and misty mountains looming under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a meadow of white wildflowers where the lake temporarily recedes and the rocky ridge draws closer. The terrain then shifts into a sparse, uneven stretch of large boulders and rocky ground before the lake reappears on the left. Finally, the path returns to grassy terrain, winding between the water and rising cliffs toward distant rocky outcrops and the persistent mist of the mountains.
